title: Drawbridgecraft: Coinr Edition
description:
Light modpack with plenty of exploration and automation to be done, and coins to be found.
A new era of DBC packs, now on modrinth.
body:
New and improved version of the Drawbridgecraft Modpack. Now on fabric with new mods, a new Minecraft version, and a whole new launcher. The pinacle of years of R&D into drawbridge technology (Contains no dedicated drawbridge mods). More of a spiritual successor to the originals. 

DBC: Coinr is a fairly light, easy to run modpack of just 39 mods with plenty of exploration to be done. There's dungeon delving with When Dungeons Arise, planet exploring with Ad Astra, automation with Create and even some archeology with Numismatic Archeology. 

And for those who love nothing more than watching their fields grow, we have Farmer's Delight.
Also features QoL mods such as Appleskin, Rei, Xaero's Minimap, Traveller's Backpacks and more.

Whether you like rockets, trains or coins, there should be something for everyone to enjoy in this pack.
